# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: functionapp
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      location: eastus
      kind: functionapp,functionapp
      properties:
        serverFarmId: '<existing_serverfarm_id>'
        siteConfig:
          appSettings:
            - name: AZURE_FUNCTIONS_EXTEND_ENABLED
              value: true
            - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
              value: ~3
          linuxFxVersion: 'DOCKER|dotnet~3.1'
        managedIdentity:
          type: SystemAssigned
      sku:
        name: Y1
        tier: Consumption

  - apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
    name: functionappmanagedidentity
    type: Microsoft.Web/sites/identities
    properties: {}
    dependsOn: [functionapp]

  - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
    name: storageAccountContributorRoleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/<storage_account>'
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
    dependsOn: [functionapp]

  - apiVersion: '2015-03-01-preview'
    name: keyvaultcontributorRoleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/<key_vault>'
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
    dependsOn: [functionapp]

  - apiVersion: '2014-04-01-preview'
    name: sqlcontributorRoleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/<sql_server>'
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
    dependsOn: [functionapp]

  - apiVersion: '2015-04-08'
    name: cosmosdbdatabaserreaderRoleAssignment
    type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    properties:
      scope: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/resourceGroups/<resource_group>/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/<cosmos_db>'
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscription_id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'
    dependsOn: [functionapp]
